name: YTBetterPlus (mirror)
subtitle: DeltAndy123's YTBetterPlus, mirrored for testing
description: Mirror of DeltAndy123/YTBetterPlus prebuilt IPAs. Hosted as a separate AltStore source so it can coexist with the YouTubePlus source (AltStore disallows duplicate bundle IDs within a single source). Both apps share com.google.ios.youtube under the hood — install one or the other, not both simultaneously.

apps.name: YTBetterPlus
apps.subtitle: YTLite 5.2b4 + 12 bundled tweaks on YouTube 21.16.2
apps.localizedDescription:
Alternative YouTube tweak build mirrored from DeltAndy123/YTBetterPlus. Built upstream with pyzule-rw (simpler than Theos), uses the last free YTLite (5.2b4) plus a richer tweak bundle than YouTubePlus.

Bundled tweaks:
• YouTube Plus (YTLite 5.2b4 — ad blocking, downloads, SponsorBlock, UI customization)
• Return YouTube Dislikes
• YTUHD (1440p / 4K)
• YTweaks (misc QoL)
• YouChooseQuality (auto quality based on Wi-Fi/cellular/AirPlay/low-power)
• DontEatMyContent (Dynamic Island fix for 2:1 video)
• YTABConfig (manual A/B feature toggles)
• YTHoldForSpeed (hold-to-toggle speed)
• YouGroupSettings (cleaner settings UI)
• YTVideoOverlay (overlay buttons): YouPiP, YouLoop, YouMute, YouQuality, YouSpeed, YouTimeStamp
• YoutubeExtensions (share-sheet + Safari extension)

Upstream source: https://github.com/DeltAndy123/YTBetterPlus

Note: shares bundle ID with YouTubePlus — install one or the other on a single device.

versions.localizedDescription:
YTBetterPlus v21.13.6-5.2b4 (DeltAndy123 prebuilt, minimal mirror).

• YouTube 21.13.6 base — the highest YouTube version compatible with free YTLite 5.2b4 per upstream issue #1; newer YouTube versions (21.14+) crash on launch with this dylib
• YTLite 5.2b4 (last free YTLite)
• ~13 bundled tweaks per upstream README
• Built upstream with pyzule-rw / cyan

Minimal mirror — ALL .appex extensions stripped from the upstream IPA (Extensions/AppMigrationExtension, PlugIns/OpenYoutubeSafariExtension, PlugIns/ShareServiceExtension) along with SC_Info/ and _CodeSignature/. Upstream IPA tripped iOS 17+ Installer's parent-prefix check on the renamed bundle ID after AltStore re-signing.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: This lets you add your own audio files to your videos.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: YouTube needs bluetooth access to scan for nearby Cast devices.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you create videos using the app.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Your contacts will be sent to YouTube servers to help you find friends to share videos with.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Access to your network allows YouTube to discover and connect to devices such as your TV.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This enables local content discovery, improved recommendations, and enhanced search results.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you include audio with your videos and search using your voice.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload media you've already created.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: To personalize ads and provide ad measurement, YouTube will link activity from this app with activity from non-Google apps and websites.

news.title: YTBetterPlus 21.16.2-5.2b4 mirror live
news.caption: Mirror of DeltAndy123/YTBetterPlus prebuilt for side-by-side test against YouTubePlus.
